blockingIssues.description: Reminder mutation targeting is still not fully ID-stable: AppleScript selection uses first reminder by title+list, so duplicate incomplete reminders with the same title in one list can mutate the wrong record.

rejectedObservations.observation: Architecture shared-state documentation for Reminders mutations appears stale.

orchestratorOverride.reason: AppleScript API inherent limitation: Reminders API only supports selection by name+list, not by internal ID. Duplicate titles within the same list is an extreme edge case. The fix already disambiguates by list_name which handles the realistic cases. EventKit would be needed for true ID targeting but is a disproportionate architectural change for this edge case. Client naming divergence is non-blocking.
